# Yes365 Car Rentals

> Toyota hybrid car rentals for Uber and DiDi drivers in Sydney, Australia.

## About

Yes365 rents Toyota hybrid vehicles exclusively to rideshare drivers operating on Uber and DiDi in Sydney. All cars include unlimited kilometres, rideshare-specific insurance, full maintenance, and 24/7 roadside assistance. Drivers can be on the road within 24 hours.

## Fleet

- Toyota Camry 50 Hybrid — from $200/week — Uber X eligible
- Toyota Corolla Hatchback Hybrid — from $250/week — Uber X eligible
- Toyota Camry 70 Hybrid — from $300/week — Uber X and Uber Comfort eligible
- Toyota RAV4 Hybrid SUV — from $350/week — Uber X and Uber Comfort eligible

## Included in every rental

- Unlimited kilometres
- Rideshare-specific comprehensive insurance
- Full service and maintenance
- Compulsory third-party cover
- 24/7 roadside assistance

## Location

2 Holbeach Ave, Tempe NSW 2044, Australia
10 minutes from Sydney Airport.

## Hours

Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Sunday: Closed (24/7 emergency line available)

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +61 456 555 415
- Email: info@yes365.au
- Website: https://yes365.au

## Eligibility

- Valid driver's licence held for at least 1 year
- Foreign licences accepted (passport required)
- Proof of address required
- No credit history required
